mapper.select: SELECT t1.contract_id, t1.contract_name, t1.`status`, t1.over_time, t1.start_time, t1.date_sign, t1.contract_num, t2.phonenumber FROM contract as t1 LEFT JOIN sys_user as t2 ON t1.tenant_id=t2.user_id ${ew.customSqlSegment} ORDER BY t1.create_time DESC
SELECT t1.email, t1.phonenumber, t1.address, t1.user_id, t1.nick_name, t1.id_num FROM sys_user AS t1 ${ew.customSqlSegment} ORDER BY t1.create_time DESC
SELECT * FROM contract t1 WHERE t1.Room_id=#{RoomId} AND t1.del_flag="0"
